'''UH-478''' was the designation of a [[Rothana Heavy Engineering/Legends|Rothana Heavy Engineering]] [[Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry/Legends|Low Altitude Assault Transport/infantry]] in service with the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]].

UH-478 saw its first combat operation at the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|Battle of]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] during the rescue of [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]], and [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]
